## Package READMEs (17 total)

| # | Package name (H1) | One-line description | Examples | Lines | Installation |
|---|-------------------|----------------------|----------|-------|--------------|
| 1 | **pydantic-response-models** | Standard API response DTOs using Pydantic (framework-agnostic) | has examples | 62 | yes |
| 2 | **python-technical-primitives** | General-purpose Python utilities (datetime, text, patterns) | has examples | 73 | yes |
| 3 | **Python Structlog Config** | Structured logging with optional OpenTelemetry and Sentry | has examples | 167 | yes |
| 4 | **FastAPI Middleware Toolkit** | Reusable FastAPI middleware (CORS, error handlers, lifespan) | has examples | 184 | yes |
| 5 | **Python Mediator** | Mediator pattern with pipeline behaviors | has examples | 156 | yes |
| 6 | **Python Outbox Core** | Core abstractions for Transactional Outbox (Kafka/FastStream) | has examples | 139 | yes |
| 7 | **FastAPI Config Patterns** | Reusable Pydantic settings for FastAPI | has examples | 120 | yes |
| 8 | **SQLAlchemy Async Repositories** | Async repository pattern with hybrid pagination | has examples | 268 | yes |
| 9 | **SQLAlchemy Async Session Factory** | Factory functions for async engine and session | has examples | 142 | yes |
| 10 | **Python CQRS Core Documentation** | CQRS interfaces and base classes with tracing | has examples | 93 | yes |
| 11 | **Python Domain Events** | Base classes for internal domain events with tracing | has examples | 95 | yes |
| 12 | **python-infrastructure-exceptions** | Infrastructure layer exception types | has examples | 85 | yes |
| 13 | **Python CQRS Dispatcher** | CQRS dispatcher wired with mediator | has examples | 141 | yes |
| 14 | **python-input-validation** | Input validation and sanitization | has examples | 48 | yes |
| 15 | **python-app-exceptions** | Base exception hierarchy for web apps | has examples | 56 | yes |
| 16 | **Python DTO Mappers** | DTO mapping with type safety and auto-mapping | has examples | 132 | yes |
| 17 | **postgres-data-sanitizers** | PostgreSQL sanitization (null chars, surrogates) | has examples | 50 | yes |

## Root README (c:\coding\gridflow\python-web-toolkit\README.md)

**Total line count:** 586

**Package sections (17 `<details>` blocks):**

1. **python-input-validation** — email/string validation  
2. **sqlalchemy-async-repositories** — generic async CRUD  
3. **sqlalchemy-async-session-factory** — async engine/session setup  
4. **python-structlog-config** — structured logging presets  
5. **fastapi-middleware-toolkit** — middleware setup  
6. **python-mediator** — mediator with pipeline behaviors  
7. **python-cqrs-core** — command/query separation  
8. **python-dto-mappers** — auto DTO mapping  
9. **fastapi-config-patterns** — typed settings from env  
10. **python-app-exceptions** — typed exception hierarchy  
11. **python-infrastructure-exceptions** — infra failure types  
12. **python-technical-primitives** — datetime/text/specification  
13. **postgres-data-sanitizers** — null chars/surrogates  
14. **python-cqrs-dispatcher** — auto command/query routing  
15. **pydantic-response-models** — uniform API responses  
16. **python-outbox-core** — transactional outbox pattern  
17. **python-domain-events** — in-process domain event dispatch  

**Architecture / layer info:** Yes. Includes:
- “Architecture” section (lines 349–362)
- Primitives / Domain / Application layers
- Dependency architecture (primitives isolated, domain depends on primitives, application depends on both)
- “Dependency Architecture” subsection
- “Layer Hierarchy” table (lines 546–552)
- “Architecture Validation” (Import Linter) section
